daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Gemini. You're giving main character energy—witty, charismatic, and genuinely magnetic. Lean into conversations that matter. Your vibe is hitting different.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift. Whether you're coupled up or floating solo, authenticity is your love language today. Skip the games; real connection is what's actually serving.
daily.career: Your ideas are gold right now. Don't sleep on that project you've been thinking about—today's the day to pitch it or start sketching it out. Colleagues are more receptive than usual.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for a breather. Maybe skip the doom-scrolling spiral tonight? A walk, some tea, or literally just existing without input sounds perfect for grounding yourself.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing and you're basically channeling main character energy. This week calls for leaning into your natural curiosity—conversations are hitting different and doors are opening in unexpected ways. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or exploring, this is a good time to be vulnerable about what you actually want. Someone's paying attention to the little things you say. Don't dim your light trying to seem chill.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable right now, especially the unconventional ones. If you've been sitting on a proposal or pitch, this week has your name on it. Collaboration over competition is the move.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit activated—all that mental energy needs an outlet. Movement helps: walks, dancing, anything that gets you out of your head and into your body.
